email.iterators/typed_subpart_iterator.name: typed_subpart_iterator
email.iterators/typed_subpart_iterator.description: This iterates over all the subparts of msg, returning only those subparts that match the MIME type specified by maintype and subtype. Note that subtype is optional; if omitted, then subpart MIME type matching is done only with the main type. maintype is optional too; it defaults to text. Thus, by default typed_subpart_iterator() returns each subpart that has a MIME type of text/*.
